# Executive Summary — <SAMPLE_ID> Stage 12 Exploration

## Overview

This document summarizes exploratory semantic analysis of the Stage 12 validation candidate substrate generated by the Variant Annotation Pipeline (VAP) for sample <SAMPLE_ID>.

The purpose of this exploration phase was to:

* characterize the semantic structure of the downstream interpretation substrate,
* evaluate prioritization behavior,
* assess rarity and clinical support distributions,
* identify biologically interesting candidate territories,
* and generate a strategic mental model for downstream case-study development.
